overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk along Bay Promenade West. The player moves along a waterfront promenade in a futuristic neon-lit city, passing outdoor cafes, a large Kang Tao billboard, the CIRKUS food stall, and NPCs seated at tables under umbrellas, with towering skyscrapers illuminated against a dark cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with city skyline view

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront railing, observing the illuminated skyscrapers across the water

entered.detail: metal railing along the edge of the promenade overlooking the water
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and neon signs across the water
glowing advertisements on building facades in the distance
plastic tables and chairs with large umbrellas along the promenade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark waterfront promenade at night, with the camera moving steadily along a metal railing. Across the water, a dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers rises against an overcast sky, their windows and neon billboards creating a cyberpunk cityscape. Sparse outdoor seating with umbrellas is visible along the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: promenade with large advertisement billboard and outdoor dining

events.description: location text 'Bay Promenade West' appears in the lower left corner of the screen
passing the large Kang Tao billboard and approaching the CIRKUS food stall area

agents.ego_description: walking past the large Kang Tao billboard and outdoor seating areas with NPCs

notable_agents.action: two people sitting at a plastic table under an umbrella

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement reading 'YOU SHOOT. WE AIM. Kang Tao' with weapon imagery
small food kiosk with blue neon 'CIRKUS' signage
tall building with '06' illuminated near the top

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the promenade passing a massive Kang Tao weapons billboard on the left. The location 'Bay Promenade West' appears on screen. NPCs are seated at tables under umbrellas, and in the distance, the CIRKUS food stall with its blue neon signage becomes visible alongside a tower marked '06'.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall plaza with tower view

events.description: slight turn to the right while passing the CIRKUS food stall
moving past the food stall into a more open plaza area with scattered seating

agents.ego_description: walking past the CIRKUS food stall and continuing along the promenade railing

notable_agents.action: person walking along the promenade in the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the CIRKUS food stall on the right, moving through a small plaza area. Tower 06 remains visible in the background. The seating areas transition from the left side to the center as the camera moves forward, and an NPC walks past in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining area with multiple occupied tables

events.description: moving through dense seating area with many NPCs sitting at tables
passing very close to seated NPCs, temporarily blocking view of the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded outdoor seating area, passing close to NPCs eating and drinking at tables

notable_agents.action: couple sitting at a table eating and drinking under an umbrella
person in purple shirt sitting at table using a phone

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a densely populated outdoor dining area with numerous tables and umbrellas. The camera passes very close to NPCs seated and eating, including a couple at a nearby table and a person using their phone. The waterfront railing remains visible on the right while the seating area dominates the left and center of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a neon-lit waterfront promenade that transitions from a wide view of the cityscape into a crowded outdoor dining area. It begins by gliding along a metal railing with a dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and glowing billboards reflecting against an overcast night sky. As the camera advances, the view shifts past a massive Kang Tao billboard and toward the blue neon signage of a CIRKUS food stall, while the open walkway begins to fill with NPCs seated under umbrellas. The scene then expands into a small plaza where the camera weaves past pedestrians and shifts the seating areas from the periphery to the center of the frame. Finally, the movement leads directly through a densely populated dining section, passing closely by patrons eating and using phones as the waterfront railing recedes to the right.
